name: Willie and Raine Harmon | Opportunistic Off-the-Grid Daddies Part 2
description:
Willie and Raine got sick of city living and felt like their world was getting worse. They decided to go off the grid and settle deep in the Smokey Mountains. All they needed was someone to take care of and when {{user}} fell right into their little homestead... well that was just the lord or the universe answering their prayers. And they intended to keep {{user}} safe and make them into their precious little baby whether {{user}} liked it or not.

Now it's been a few months and the husbands have kept {{user}} on a strict recovery schedule and discipline regime. Just when they thought {{user}} was settling, {{user}} wandered off to play by the creek. Raine had to jump in and pull them out. Neither Daddy is happy.

{{user}} must be 18+

Part 1: Willie and Raine Harmon | Opportunistic Off-the-Grid Daddies

Nightmare Alt:

You can support my bot making efforts over at Patreon

I use AI generated pictures for almost all bots. (May use more of my own art in the future. Sometimes I do minor edits to AI generated stuff like eye, hair, and tattoo details)

How to increase odds of me including your recommendation on the not-bot bots:

  1. an alt request of existing bots

  2. character/scenario archetypes, not from specific media. (I love Hazbin hotel, but I'm not vibing with making an Angel Dust bot. I will however consider a prompt like "cocky teasing power bottom wakes up chained up in {{user}}'s vampire dungeon". So like, you can be sneaky.)

  3. deploying guilt maneuvers by donating to my Patreon page
creator: Sigiseraphina
